textByHash.f835748719316de2cd1b41c9f0dd4547d78fc962: Welcome to my clothes stall, can I help you with anything?
textByHash.315b78acea958fe5c3e002e3ac2b3fe886a7f149: Oh, that sounds interesting, what's this about?
textByHash.3cfd29a622b26570575c27602ce4bec5e9e4585f: Oh dear, that statue is in a terrible mess, isn't it?
textByHash.6f3a22ecb07ff8189b6bf2802a6f0933c3aa8ed6: I could hear the tumult from over here!
textByHash.7e4dfe65f18b62ef76468cf7553943494145dae4: Oh no, no, I can't quite recall what the clothes looked like. But I know someone who can!
textByHash.c77590b5f2bf555798c2d71d2f81148c039036d8: Well, I'm sure Hugi the librarian in West can help you along.
textByHash.ecb2373311780e62dba2d32200e98bda71bd17ba: Keldagrim-West, dear... on the other side of the Kelda, towards the north end of the city.
textByHash.e1eb9384129f917b7ae6556bf8af0c77cba071e2: I'm sure he can show you the exact designs of the clothes.
textByHash.bb77a2be4b249f1a1d35410cacf795ee1b79f5c3: Oh, just bring the designs to me then, I'll fix you up some nice clothes!
textByHash.ddcf63bfdd0c82a20c4a65a4d474e07e5a9b7363: Sounds like a fun little thing to do!
textByHash.31c774fe68c7b3526200f31a9b78f55ab70b8289: Oh yes, did you get those designs from the librarian?
textByHash.75cc14a070697896329b374b09baf16ec66eaaf8: I can definitely help you with this.
textByHash.05f7560a8e1d10f2b9b1ed9fbda2d1f326c58744: I only have one small problem, you see... I've run out of fuel for my spinning machine.
textByHash.62bb5572e3559eb0dd1e6ec66b06e90faaaa1923: But I've used up all my coal and wood and I don't have the time to leave my stall to get them.
textByHash.bd047db48633644163555e12c86fd124e486c978: Well, like I said, I can't do anything really without my spinning machine.
textByHash.c11c8fd4a48ab112ad49b0c74a1515bee8fc7dad: Some coal and logs should do it!
textByHash.61de741fc2a71762ed005ea799873040080a4e62: Then put them in the machine dear!
textByHash.479b9efb5de712bd08e70b48bf24b51942d7301f: Well, the spinning machine is all ready now, except that it needs to be powered up.
textByHash.98278b765fdfc0589734850db528727866d8684c: As soon as it's up and running, I can spin your clothes for you.
textByHash.c8698b23a002d75e70f2ce5082db5b3367fd0b9b: Why, you light the logs of course!
textByHash.ad03828460a36c1342991868162b27a35ad40ed9: Yes, I can spin them for you, but I will have to ask you for a small payment of money for them.
textByHash.71c9ce9be893007ab47531caba183dfd52d764f7: I'm sorry, but the cloth to spin this is expensive. But for you, I can make the clothes for a nominal fee of 200 credits.
textByHash.1c5f10bc3df9d5fc818f3e7290e1a0537269408c: Wonderful, let me get started then!
textByHash.31a3ac9ed933a6679f5ed1eb274635bc3ebaeaf0: There we go! And look how beautiful these clothes look!
textByHash.9ee5d85f141baf675e4e312bdafd6e530891f6b3: I'm sorry you feel that way, I was looking forward to making these clothes.
textByHash.32fc9054756b09687e224b3ebbbc14f5af9d1a52: Not a lot, I'm afraid, most of what I produce goes to my sister. Her shop is in Keldagrim-West.
